2025 NeurIPS 中稿论文分布与清单

  • 状态：available
  • 官方入口：https://openreview.net/group?id=NeurIPS.cc/2025/Conference
  • 备注：OpenReview accepted submissions available.
  • 纳入论文数：5286

Distribution

领域 篇数 占比
LLM/NLP 768 14.5%
Computer Vision 1143 21.6%
Multimodal 62 1.2%
Reinforcement Learning 353 6.7%
Robotics/Embodied AI 68 1.3%
Generative Models 362 6.8%
AI for Science 100 1.9%
ML Theory 298 5.6%
Optimization 273 5.2%
Trustworthy/Safety/Fairness 337 6.4%
Data/Training Systems 1347 25.5%
Applications 173 3.3%
Other 2 0.0%
Total 5286 100.0%
